pr.title: RHOAIENG-61646: fix(sdk): --wait polls indefinitely and misreports state for partially failed jobs
pr.body:
The previous commit correctly used effective_state for terminal-state
checks but left three display points still using job.state, causing the
CLI to misreport the state for partially failed jobs. This updates
_watch_job progress output, _print_job_detail, and eval_results warning
to consistently use effective_state.

Closes RHOAIENG-61646

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Rui Vieira <rcardoso@redhat.com>
pr.author: jira-autofix[bot]
